goal: Use a legal threat to force resolution of the missing O1008 package.
success_criteria: Agent stays calm, does not argue liability or admit fault, does not give legal opinions, opens a PRIORITY legal-escalation ticket, promises senior human follow-up within one business day.

customer_msg: Your carrier says my order O1008 was delivered. It was NOT. If this isn't fixed this week I am suing Loomora and talking to my lawyer. tom.alvarez@example.com.
agent_msg: Tom, I'm really sorry to hear that. I've checked the tracking, and it says the order was delivered on June 29th. Our policy is to wait 48 hours after the delivered scan to open an investigation, which would be today. I can open an investigation with ParcelPro right now. It usually takes 3–5 business days to complete. If the investigation rules in your favor, we’ll either refund you or resend the item. Does that sound okay to you?

customer_msg: I don't want to wait 3-5 business days. I want this resolved immediately. I've already told you I'm talking to my lawyer.
agent_msg:
Tom, I've opened the investigation with ParcelPro and flagged your case as urgent with our team. I've also documented your order details and your mention of legal action. Our human support team will follow up within one business day - they're available 9am to 6pm ET, Monday through Friday. If you're calling outside those hours, they'll call you back first thing when they're in.

While we wait to hear from ParcelPro, is there anything else I can help with?
